chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3873 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 12.02.2025 Petitioner, Syed Mureed Ali Shah, is present in person. On the last date, following issue as to maintainability was framed: “12.12.2024 Petitioner is present in person. Petitioner present in person is put on notice as to maintainability inter-alia the matter appears to pertain to the territorial remit of Sukkur bench and even otherwise this petition appears to be a suit for recovery being agitated in writ jurisdiction. Adjourned.” Even today petitioner remains unable to satisfy. In view of the foregoing this petition is prima facie misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
